@if(documentDataSource.data.length){
@for (header of documentHeaders; track $index) { }
{{ header.header }} @switch(header.key){ @case(VendorDocumentKey.DOCUMENT_NAME){
{{ row.documentName || '-' }}
} @case(VendorDocumentKey.DOCUMENT_TYPE){
{{row?.attachmentUrl?.[0]?.fileName||'-'}} {{ getAttachmentDisplay(row) }}
} @case(VendorDocumentKey.DESCRIPTION){
{{ row.description || '-' }}
} @case(VendorDocumentKey.EFFECTIVE_DATE){ {{row.effectiveDate ? (row.effectiveDate | date:'dd-MM-yyyy') : '-'}} } @case(VendorDocumentKey.EXPIRY_DATE){ {{row.expiryDate ? (row.expiryDate | date:'dd-MM-yyyy') : '-'}} } @case(VendorDocumentKey.ACTION){
} @default{ {{row[header.columnDef] || '-'}} } }
} @else{ }
